🚀 Mission desk

Planning café visits, é accents, and the 𝌆 symbol.

Welcome

@if (account(); as user) {

Hello, {{ user.displayName }}.

@if (user.plan === 'enterprise' && user.permissions.includes('admin')) { Open administration } @else if (user.plan === 'pro') { Pro workspace } @else { Compare plans } } @else if (sessionLoading()) {

Restoring your session…

} @else { Sign in }

Active missions

{{ filteredMissions().length }} visible
@for ( mission of filteredMissions(); track mission.id; let index = $index, first = $first, last = $last, even = $even ) {

{{ index + 1 }}. {{ mission.name }}

@if (first) { Next launch }

{{ mission.destination }} · {{ mission.launchAt | date: 'mediumDate' }}

    @for (member of mission.crew; track member.id; let crewIndex = $index) {
  • {{ crewIndex + 1 }} — {{ member.name }} @if (member.commander) { commander } @else { specialist }
    • } @empty {
  • No crew assigned yet.
    • }
@if (last) { End of the active queue. }
} @empty {

No matching missions

Clear a filter to see the full launch queue.

}

Telemetry

@switch (telemetryState()) { @case ('connected') { Receiving live data @if (latency() > 500) {

High latency: {{ latency() }} ms

} } @case ('reconnecting') { Reconnecting… } @case ('paused') { Paused by operator } @default { Offline } }

Launch weather

@defer (on viewport; prefetch on idle) { } @placeholder (minimum 300ms) { } @loading (after 100ms; minimum 500ms) {

Loading forecast for {{ selectedSite().name }}…

} @error {

The forecast could not be loaded.

}
@if (showArchive()) {

Recent archive

@for (year of archiveYears(); track year.value) {
{{ year.value }} ({{ year.missions.length }}) @for (pastMission of year.missions; track pastMission.slug) { {{ pastMission.name }} } @empty { No archived launches. }
} @empty {

The archive index is empty.

}
}

Recommendation

@switch (recommendation()?.kind) { @case ('article') {

{{ recommendation()?.title }}

{{ recommendation()?.summary }}

} @case ('video') { } @default { @if (recommendationLoading()) {

Choosing something useful…

} @else {

No recommendation today.

} } }
@defer (when activityEnabled(); prefetch when signedIn()) { } @placeholder {

Activity will appear when enabled.

} @loading { } @error {

Activity is temporarily unavailable.

}
